content:
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.6 – Chaos Archetypes, Weekly Curses, Literary Artifacts, and Expanding the RPG System


🚀 This iteration introduces chaotic archetypes, weekly curses/status effects, structured literary items per week, and refinements to the XP and scribe systems.

📜 1. Chaos Archetypes – Players Who Disrupt the Game

📜 These archetypes introduce unpredictability, forcing others to adapt to their actions.

✔ Only one student may select each of these chaos archetypes.
✔ These roles come with unique mechanics that allow them to manipulate the game in unexpected ways.
✔ Some alter the class’s path entirely, while others create short-term complications.

📖 Chaos Archetypes & Their Mechanics
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 318 (chunk 318/555)
